scope: Eight representative MoonCats for deterministic parser, LibMoonCat/trait, and documented materialization-path comparison. This is not a full-population render corpus, palette record, on-chain execution result, or current accessory-state snapshot.

identifier.comparisonMethod: Compare fixture rescueOrder/catIdBytes5 with the trait row and LibMoonCat getMoonCatIdByRescueIndex/getRescueOrder round trip.
identifier.failureMeaning: Meaningful: paths would be comparing different MoonCats.

sourceTrait.comparisonMethod: Compare common identifier, rescueYear, facing, expression, pattern, pose, pale, genesis, hueName, and hueInt/hueValue fields between the selected trait row and LibMoonCat extended traits.
sourceTrait.failureMeaning: Meaningful except for the fixture-declared Genesis hue sentinels and skyblue/skyBlue vocabulary differences retained from the visual-trait mismatch report.

structuralRender.comparisonMethod: Run mooncatparser twice, normalize each nested pixel matrix to row/width counts, occupied-coordinate SHA-256, bounding box, distinct-color count, sorted per-color cell counts, and a color-partition SHA-256; compare the two normalizations exactly.
structuralRender.failureMeaning: Meaningful for local parser determinism and normalized structure. It is not an on-chain SVG equivalence assertion.

colorPalette.comparisonMethod: Record parser color partition only; do not compare it with MoonCatColors colorsOf or a derived human-facing label because checked-in artifacts do not provide executable per-cat on-chain palette output.
colorPalette.failureMeaning: Not executable is intentional and does not imply a parser/materialization mismatch.

exactSerialization.comparisonMethod: No MoonCatSVGs generated SVG string is checked in, and LibMoonCat image helpers require a DOM in this environment.
exactSerialization.failureMeaning: Not executable is intentional; byte-identical SVG is not required for structural equivalence.

documentedMaterialization.comparisonMethod: Verify fixture identity and source-trait inputs are compatible with the reviewed MoonCatSVGs imageOf(bytes5,bool) and imageOf(uint256,bool) contract path; do not fabricate contract output.
documentedMaterialization.failureMeaning: A failure would mean the documented input contract is being used with the wrong identity type; no generated SVG comparison is claimed.

accessoryComposition.comparisonMethod: No fixture invokes MoonCatAccessoryImages because deterministic owned records, definitions, image data, palettes, layering, and current worn state are not checked in.
accessoryComposition.failureMeaning: Deferred is intentional; no ownership or accessory composition is inferred.

intentionalDifferences: hueName snapshot skyblue versus LibMoonCat skyBlue
hueName snapshot skyblue versus LibMoonCat skyBlue
hueName snapshot skyblue versus LibMoonCat skyBlue

limitations: Derived colorClassification labels remain separate display metadata and are not palette/RGB/hex/render proof.
Normal or inverted palette orientation is not asserted because no checked-in source provides an executable per-cat comparison path.
MoonCatSVGs and MoonCatAccessoryImages are assessed only through their reviewed input/output contracts; no offline contract execution or serialized SVG output is available.
Accessory composition is deferred because definitions, owned records, palettes, image data, layering inputs, and current worn state are not deterministically checked in.
